summary: Completed testing of TTS (Text-to-Speech), Nova Insights Dashboard, and Google Calendar OAuth endpoints. Backend: 22 tests, 21 passed (95.5%). Frontend: NovaChat modal with TTS toggle, voice/image buttons working. Nova Insights page fully functional with voice settings tab. All new features verified working.

minor.issue: Invalid voice input returns 400 error instead of fallback - acceptable validation behavior

issues: UI is clean and well-designed with proper tabs and sections

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/nova/tts/voices returns 9 voices with correct structure
Backend: POST /api/nova/tts generates speech audio as base64
Backend: POST /api/nova/tts with different voice (alloy) works
Backend: POST /api/nova/tts empty text returns 400 validation error
Backend: GET /api/nova/tts/preferences/{user_id} returns voice/speed/enabled
Backend: POST /api/nova/tts/preferences/{user_id} updates preferences
Backend: TTS preferences persistence verified via GET after SET
Backend: GET /api/nova/insights/{user_id} returns comprehensive insights
Backend: GET /api/nova/insights/{user_id}/timeline returns moving timeline
Backend: GET /api/nova/insights/{user_id}/matches returns property matches
Backend: GET /api/nova/insights/{user_id}/trends returns market trends
Backend: Insights activity_summary has correct structure
Backend: Insights recommendations array present
Backend: GET /api/calendar/google/auth-url generates valid Google OAuth URL
Backend: GET /api/calendar/google/status/{user_id} returns connected boolean
Backend: DELETE /api/calendar/google/disconnect/{user_id} works
Backend: GET /api/calendar/events/{user_id} local calendar still works
Backend: POST /api/chat main chat still working
Backend: GET /api/listings returns property listings
Backend: GET /api/nova/memory/{user_id} memory endpoint working
Backend: GET /api/nova/suggestions/{user_id} suggestions endpoint working
Frontend: Nova Chat button visible on /browse page
Frontend: Nova Chat modal opens with all UI elements
Frontend: Voice toggle (TTS on/off) button in header works
Frontend: Mic button for voice input visible
Frontend: Camera/Image upload button visible
Frontend: NovaInsights page loads after login
Frontend: NovaInsights Overview tab shows stats and recommendations
Frontend: NovaInsights Nova Settings tab shows voice settings
Frontend: Voice selection grid shows all 9 voices (Alloy, Ash, Coral, Echo, Fable, Nova, Onyx, Sage, Shimmer)
Frontend: Speech Speed slider present and functional
critical_code_review_comments: TTS integration using emergentintegrations OpenAI TTS API is working correctly
Nova Insights service aggregates data from multiple collections properly
Google Calendar OAuth URL generation working - actual OAuth flow requires user interaction
All 9 TTS voices (alloy, ash, coral, echo, fable, nova, onyx, sage, shimmer) available
seed_data_creation: Created test TTS preferences for user test_user_tts_iter12
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 tested new features: 1) TTS at /api/nova/tts - generates audio from text using OpenAI TTS via emergentintegrations, all 9 voices available. 2) TTS preferences at /api/nova/tts/preferences/{user_id} - stores voice, speed, enabled settings. 3) Nova Insights at /api/nova/insights/{user_id} - comprehensive analytics with search history, preference evolution, market trends, moving timeline, property match scores, activity summary, and recommendations. 4) Google Calendar OAuth at /api/calendar/google/auth-url - generates valid Google OAuth URL with real credentials. Frontend: NovaChat modal on /browse has TTS toggle, mic button, camera button. NovaInsights page (/nova-insights) has tabs: Overview, Moving Timeline, Property Matches, Market Trends, Nova Settings with full voice configuration UI.

mocked_services.google_calendar_actual_sync: OAuth flow generates valid URL but actual calendar sync requires user interaction
mocked_services.tts_integration: Uses REAL OpenAI TTS API via emergentintegrations
mocked_services.nova_insights: Uses REAL data from database collections when available

TTS (Text-to-Speech).notes: Real OpenAI TTS integration, 9 voices, speed control 0.25-4x

Nova Insights Dashboard.notes: Comprehensive analytics with recommendations, market trends, moving timeline

Google Calendar OAuth.notes: OAuth URL generation works, actual Google API integration requires user consent flow

NovaChat Voice Toggle.notes: Toggle enables/disables TTS for Nova responses

NovaInsights Voice Settings UI.notes: Full UI for voice selection, enable toggle, speed slider
